name: You
text: I found this. Near the well.

name: Ana
text: I haven't seen this in... a long time.

name: You
text: Do you know whose it is?

name: Ana
text: ...There were people here once. Before all this.

name: Ana
text: Twelve of them. Young and loud and full of arguments.

name: Ana
text: Everything. Where to put the road. How deep to dig the well.

name: Ana
text: One of them never stopped arguing. But he worked harder than anyone.

name: Ana
text: I think I knew him well. I can't quite...

name: Ana
text: There's a fisherman down by the water. Young one.

name: Ana
text: His grandfather used to come by every Friday. Go talk to him.
